why.title: Why your business needs
why.introTitle: Your customers are already looking for you online. What do they find when they search for your business?
why.introText: Before calling, booking or visiting, many customers check a business online first. A professional website presents your activity clearly, reassures your prospects and guides them toward getting in touch.

cards.title: Build trust from the very first search
cards.text: A clear, professional website reassures future customers about your seriousness, your expertise and the quality of your services. Without one, a business can look less established than a competitor with far less experience.

cards.title: Your business stays reachable, even when you're off
cards.text: Your services, opening hours, contact details and key information remain available at all times. Prospects can discover your business without waiting for a reply on social media or by phone.

cards.title: Turn searches into real contacts
cards.text: A visitor who quickly understands what you offer, why to choose you and how to reach you is far more likely to take action. Your website can generate:

cards.title: Present your business at the level of your work
cards.text: A modern, personalized design showcases your craft and sets you apart from competitors. Your website should reflect the real quality of your business.

cards.title: Stop depending only on social media
cards.text: Instagram, Facebook and social platforms are useful, but you control neither their rules nor their algorithms. Your website puts you in charge of:

cards.title: Help future customers find you
cards.text: A fast, well-structured, properly optimized website helps search engines understand your activity, your services and your area. Your online visibility can then improve progressively, on solid foundations.

cards.title: Without clear information, customers may pick a competitor
cards.text: When a prospect can't quickly find your services, your hours or an easy way to contact you, they may simply keep searching elsewhere. A website prevents losing opportunities just because information was hard to find.

cards.title: Your website grows with your business
cards.text: Over time it can evolve to include new services, completed work, online booking, appointment scheduling or new pages.

why.conclusion: Your website never sleeps. It presents your business, answers first questions and helps prospects take action, around the clock.
why.cta: Get my website in one week

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before starting your web project.

items.q: How much does a website cost?
items.a: A professional website starts from €500. The final price depends on the number of pages, the amount of content, the requested features, integrations and the level of customization. After a first conversation, you receive a clear, detailed quote within 24 hours — no hidden fees. Hosting and maintenance then cost €20 per month.

items.q: How fast can my website be built?
items.a: Most of our professional websites are built in one week. The timeline mainly depends on the complexity of the project and how quickly we receive your content and feedback. For more advanced projects, a precise schedule is set before we start.

It covers the entire technical side: hosting, SSL certificate (HTTPS), technical updates, bug fixes, uptime monitoring and support if anything goes wrong. Small changes — texts, opening hours, contact details — are included too. Larger changes, new pages or additional features are quoted separately.

items.q: How does the website creation process work?
items.a: Four steps: discovery (your goals, business and customers), design (mockups tailored to your brand), development (a fast, secure, mobile-ready site), then launch after final checks. You approve each step, and most websites are delivered in one week.

items.q: Can I request changes after launch?
items.a: Yes. Bug fixes and small changes — texts, opening hours, contact details, practical information — are included in the €20/month plan. For bigger changes, such as new pages or new features, we provide a quote before doing any work.

items.q: Will my website be optimized for Google?
items.a: Yes. Every website ships technically optimized for search: clean structure, correct tags, fast loading, mobile-ready and content that search engines and AI assistants can easily understand. These foundations help your online visibility improve progressively — though no ranking can ever be guaranteed, by anyone.

items.q: Can you redesign my existing website?
items.a: Yes. If your current site is slow, dated or hard to update, we rebuild it on a modern foundation: a new design true to your brand, better performance, mobile support and clean SEO basics. We first review your existing site, then send you a tailored quote.
